settings.text:
Potential Fly Preorder FAQ

1. What is a preorder?

A preorder allows you to reserve an item before it is officially released. By placing a preorder, you ensure that you’ll receive your desired item as soon as it becomes available.

2. How do I place a preorder?

To place a preorder, simply browse our collection, select your desired item, choose your size, and click the “Preorder” button. Follow the checkout process to complete your purchase.

3. When will my preorder items ship?

Preorder items will typically ship within [insert time frame, e.g., 4-6 weeks] after the release date. You’ll receive an email notification with tracking information as soon as your order ships.

4. Can I cancel my preorder?

Yes, you can cancel your preorder within [insert time frame, e.g., 48 hours] of placing the order. Please contact our customer service team to initiate the cancellation process.

5. Will I be charged immediately for my preorder?

Yes, the full amount will be charged at the time of your preorder to secure your item.

6. What if I preorder multiple items?

If you preorder multiple items, they will all ship together once the last item is available. If you would like to receive items as they become available, please place separate orders.

7. What if my size is sold out?

If your desired size is sold out, please check back frequently. We often restock popular items or release new sizes based on demand.

8. How can I track my preorder?

Once your preorder ships, you will receive a confirmation email with tracking information. You can also check your order status by logging into your account on our website.

9. What if there’s a delay in my preorder?

While we do our best to stick to the estimated shipping dates, unforeseen circumstances may cause delays. We’ll keep you updated via email if there are any changes to your order’s status.

10. What is your return policy for preorder items?

Please note that all preorder items are final sale. We do not offer returns or refunds, so please choose carefully when placing your order.

11. How do I stay updated on future preorders?

To stay informed about upcoming releases and preorder opportunities, subscribe to our newsletter and follow us on social media.

WEARS YOUR FLY?
